title: BEM-850 verify fail closed
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:46 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
resp=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md')
txt=read(resp)
response_ok=resp.exists() and 'CLAUDE RESPONSE | BEM-844' in txt and 'Decision:' in txt
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
results=[]
rd=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if rd.exists():
    for p in sorted(rd.glob('*.status.json')):
        try: data=json.loads(read(p))
        except Exception as exc: data={'status':'unparsed','error':str(exc),'text':read(p)[:500]}
        results.append({'path':str(p),'data':data})
queue=[str(p) for p in sorted(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').glob('*.json'))] if Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').exists() else []
if response_ok:
    status='bem844_response_file_present'
    next_action='process response into agreed protocol or BLOCKED reason'
elif not results:
    status='dispatch_results_missing_for_fail_closed'
    next_action='repair dispatch/result pipeline; dispatcher never reached fail-closed writer proof'
elif not (runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at')):
    status='runtime_missing_for_fail_closed'
    next_action='repair dispatcher runtime start/state writer'
else:
    status='fail_closed_writer_not_executed'
    next_action='inspect dispatcher YAML placement of ensure_claude_response_file.py'
state={'bem':'BEM-850','status':status,'response_exists':resp.exists(),'response_ok':response_ok,'response_preview':txt[:1200],'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'dispatch_results_tail':results[-10:],'queue_remaining':queue[-20:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem850_verify_fail_closed_response_file.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem850_verify_fail_closed_response_file.md').write_text('# BEM-850 | Verify Fail Closed Response File | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-850'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem850_verify_fail_closed_response_file.json','governance/reports/bem850_verify_fail_closed_response_file.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified whether fail-closed Claude response file exists after BEM-848/BEM-849 dispatcher retry')
"""
